Klasse ArticleExporter

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.ArticleExporter
public final class ArticleExporter extends Object
Utility to export a JTable with article data into a PDF file.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static void
    exportArticlesToCsv(List<Article> articles)
    Exports the given list of articles to a CSV file, prompting the user for the save location.
    static void
    exportArticlesToPdf(List<Article> articles)
    Exports the given list of articles to a PDF file, prompting the user for the save location.
    static void

    Exports the given list of log entries to a PDF file, prompting the user for the save location.
    static void

    Generates a PDF file representing an order, including sender and receiver information, department, and a list of ordered articles with their quantities and prices.
    static void
    exportTableAsPdf(Component parent, JTable table, int[] baseColumnWidths, Icon icon)
    Exports the contents of a JTable to a PDF file, allowing the user to choose the save location and file name.

    Sanitizes a string to ensure it only contains characters that can be represented in WinAnsi encoding.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Methodendetails

    • exportTableAsPdf

      public static void exportTableAsPdf(Component parent, JTable table, int[] baseColumnWidths, Icon icon)
      Exports the contents of a JTable to a PDF file, allowing the user to choose the save location and file name. The PDF will include a header with the title and export date, a table with the article data, and a footer with page numbers and total article count.
      Parameter:
      parent - The parent component for the file chooser dialog
      table - The JTable containing the article data to be exported
      baseColumnWidths - An array of integers representing the base widths for each column, which will be used to calculate proportional column widths in the PDF. If the array has fewer entries than the number of columns in the table, default widths will be used for the remaining columns.
      icon - An Icon to be used in error messages if the export process fails. This can be null if no icon is desired.

    • sanitizeForWinAnsi

      public static String sanitizeForWinAnsi(String text)
      Sanitizes a string to ensure it only contains characters that can be represented in WinAnsi encoding.
      Parameter:
      text - The input text to sanitize
      Gibt zurück:
      A sanitized version of the input text, where characters that cannot be represented in WinAnsi are removed. If the input text is null or empty, an empty string is returned.

    • exportOrderToPDF

      public static void exportOrderToPDF(File file, JComboBox<String> senderNameCombobox, JTextField senderKontoField, JComboBox<String> receiverNameCombobox, JTextField receiverKontoField, JComboBox<String> departmentList, Map<Article,Integer> orderArticles) throws IOException
      Generates a PDF file representing an order, including sender and receiver information, department, and a list of ordered articles with their quantities and prices.
      Parameter:
      file - The file to which the PDF will be saved
      senderNameCombobox - A JComboBox containing the sender's name (selected item will be used)
      senderKontoField - A JTextField containing the sender's account information
      receiverNameCombobox - A JComboBox containing the receiver's name (selected item will be used)
      receiverKontoField - A JTextField containing the receiver's account information
      departmentList - A JComboBox containing the department information (selected item will be used)
      orderArticles - A Map of Article objects to their ordered quantities, representing the articles included in the order
      Löst aus:
      IOException - If an error occurs during PDF generation or saving the file

    • exportArticlesToPdf

      public static void exportArticlesToPdf(List<Article> articles)
      Exports the given list of articles to a PDF file, prompting the user for the save location.
      Parameter:
      articles - Die Liste der Artikel, die exportiert werden sollen

    • exportArticlesToCsv

      public static void exportArticlesToCsv(List<Article> articles)
      Exports the given list of articles to a CSV file, prompting the user for the save location.
      Parameter:
      articles - Die Liste der Artikel, die exportiert werden sollen

    • exportLogsToPdf

      public static void exportLogsToPdf(List<String> logs, JFrame frame)
      Exports the given list of log entries to a PDF file, prompting the user for the save location. Each log entry is wrapped to fit within the page width, and multiple pages are created if necessary.
      Parameter:
      logs - Die Liste der Log-Einträge, die exportiert werden sollen. Jeder Eintrag wird als separate Zeile im PDF dargestellt.
      frame - Das übergeordnete JFrame, das als Kontext für die Dateiauswahl und Fehlermeldungen verwendet wird. Kann null sein, wenn kein Kontext benötigt wird.
